00 · about

A Little Context

I'm a marketer who actually enjoys the brief. The research, the weird a/b test, the campaign that works for a reason you didn't expect.

I've spent 2+ years at the intersection of product and growth - figuring out why merchants churn, what subject lines get opened, and how to turn a feature nobody's using into one everybody wants.

At Shopflo (a D2C checkout startup), I own the full lifecycle motion: welcome flows, PLG upgrade campaigns, product webinars, case studies, competitive intel, and the LinkedIn strategy that grew us 4,000+ followers. I work closest with product, growth, and the founders - and I've learned that the best marketing starts with actually talking to customers.

Lifecycle & CRM PLG Conversion D2C / E-commerce Content Strategy Sales Enablement Webinars & Events Competitive Intel SEO · HubSpot Certified
01 · case studies

Work That Moved the Numbers

Lifecycle Marketing

Cutting Early Churn With Welcome & NPS Automation

The Problem
Shopflo was losing merchants in months 0-2. No structured onboarding meant users never found value before the invoice arrived.
My Approach
Interviewed churned users, mapped the activation journey, then designed segmented email sequences tied to in-product milestones - not just time. Added NPS at the 60-day mark to collect signal before churn happened.
Cross-functional
Partnered with product (for event triggers) and CS (for churn signal) to build the workflow end-to-end.
42.5%reduction in M0-M2 churn
92%NPS survey completion rate
50%+email open rate sustained
PLG Conversion

Free-to-Paid PLG Campaign for Upsell & Cart

The Problem
Hundreds of merchants had activated upsell and cart features but never converted to paid. Usage was there - willingness to pay wasn't.
My Approach
Built a PLG messaging layer - in-product nudges + conversion emails timed to feature milestones, not just days-since-signup. Framed every message around revenue the merchant was leaving on the table, not product features.
Cross-functional
Worked with product eng for event triggers, and growth for pricing narrative alignment.
600users moved free → paid
15-20%feature adoption post-launch
₹20KMRR from reactivation campaign
Sales Enablement

Customer Stories That Moved ₹18L in Pipeline

The Problem
Sales had no proof points. Demos ran long because AEs were manually explaining ROI with no supporting material.
My Approach
Ran structured customer interviews, then built a library of 10+ case studies - each with a clear "before/after" framed around the customer's real problem. Built a live "Shopflo vs competitors" objection page for demo-stage blockers.
Cross-functional
Partnered with sales (interview access + demo feedback) and the founders (narrative sign-off) to ensure every story was accurate and on-brand.
₹18L+pipeline influenced
10+customer stories produced
3.5%CTR on product update emails
02 · launches

Things I Shipped

01
Product Newsletter
Owned the end-to-end product newsletter for Shopflo. From content curation to segmentation to send. Consistent 50%+ open rates with a conversational tone that made product updates feel like a personal note, not a changelog.
50%+
open rates
lifecycle
02
Invoicing Automation Flow
Designed and launched an automated invoicing email sequence that replaced manual follow-ups. Hit 87% collection rate, reduced payment delays, and freed up ops bandwidth.
87%
collection rate
automation
03
Multichannel Campaigns
Ran 12+ coordinated campaigns across email, WhatsApp, and in-product nudges for feature launches and reactivation. Built playbooks for which channel to use at each stage of the merchant lifecycle.
12+
campaigns
growth
04
Upsell, Cart, Rewards - GTM Webinar
Full GTM for Shopflo's flagship product webinar - email series, social creatives, registration flow, live hosting, and a post-webinar nurture sequence tied to feature adoption CTAs. 200+ registrations, 100+ live attendees.
15-20%
feature adoption
webinar
05
COD Flowchart + Kill Keep Playbook
Conceptualised, wrote, and distributed two inbound lead magnets. The COD Flowchart was featured in YourStory and drove 400+ downloads. The Kill Keep Introduce playbook hit 800+ downloads and became a top sales conversation starter.
400+ / 800+
downloads
content GTM
